mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_role, username, phone, appeal_type, description, attachment, status, response, responded_by, responded_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_appeal (user_id, user_role, username, phone, appeal_type, description, attachment, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userRole}, #{username}, #{phone}, #{appealType}, #{description}, #{attachment}, 'PENDING', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_appeal SET user_role = #{userRole}, username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, appeal_type = #{appealType}, description = #{description}, attachment = #{attachment}, status = #{status}, response = #{response}, responded_by = #{respondedBy}, responded_at = #{respondedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.full_name as responded_by_name FROM t_appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.responded_by = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT a.*, u.full_name as responded_by_name FROM t_appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.responded_by = u.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT a.*, u.full_name as responded_by_name FROM t_appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.responded_by = u.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT a.*, u.full_name as responded_by_name FROM t_appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.responded_by = u.id WHERE a.status = #{status} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT a.*, u.full_name as responded_by_name FROM t_appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.responded_by = u.id WHERE a.user_role = #{userRole} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_appeal WHERE status = #{status}
